texto: He was the old breed of Filipino, almost extinct, who required that he deserve what he received; who would feel guilt, not only shame or embarrassment; who accounted for each day in the office and observed public trust as if it were a word of God. But even God was nowhere. The new theology proclaimed him dead. Long live Man! Love live Me!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Linda Ty-Casper: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “He was the old breed of Filipino, almost extinct, who required that he deserve what he received; …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, belief, culture pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e culture.
